nonBlockingIssues.description: Test 'should update updated_at timestamp' has a race condition due to 1.1s setTimeout and Bun's parallel test execution. The beforeEach cleanup can run during the delay.
Test 'should update updated_at timestamp' uses 1100ms setTimeout which causes race condition with beforeEach cleanup when tests run concurrently. Test passes when run in isolation.
Test 'should update last_seen_at on subsequent requests' has a race condition issue between describe blocks, not an implementation bug. All other tests pass including concurrent request handling.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the testing pattern for timestamp-related tests to avoid race conditions. Recommend using shorter delays or mocking the clock instead of setTimeout in tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three features (project-crud-api, task-crud-api, agent-auto-registration) have tests with race conditions due to setTimeout delays combined with Bun's parallel test execution.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the CORS origin configuration requirements for the API server. Currently hardcoded to localhost:3201 and 127.0.0.1:3201 in src/server.ts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: hono-server-setup review noted that CORS origins are hardcoded but AGENTS.md only mentions dashboard runs on port 3201 without explicit CORS documentation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add knowledge entry about SQLite timestamp precision (seconds only) and the need to adjust test expectations when comparing dates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: task-claim-release-api review noted the worker had to adjust test expectations by subtracting 1 second to account for SQLite's seconds-only precision.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add knowledge entry about the task_logs table design decision to NOT use foreign key constraints on task_id to allow audit trail persistence after task deletion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both db-schema-setup and activity-logging reviews noted this intentional design decision for audit trails.
